##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/subject/type/list 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/subject/type/list 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于全量查询公司下的预算科目分类+科目列表，呈现树状结构，首层为预算科目分类，子级为预算科目分类下的预算科目列表。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":null}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%2B%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"TYPE001","desc":"%20%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"children","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"10","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"expenseTypes","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"expSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subjectSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"2","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8BID","exampleValue":"01","desc":"","maxLength":"25"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expName","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%9C%BA%E7%A5%A8%E8%B4%B9","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"orderNum","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E9%A1%BA%E5%BA%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subTypeSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"20","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"amountEntryMode","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"standPerDay","desc":"%20byTotalAmount%20-%E6%80%BB%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%0AstandPerDay-%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86*%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"standardValue","required":false,"label":"%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"30.2","desc":"%20%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%20standPerDay-%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86*%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9%E6%97%B6%0A%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E6%AF%8F%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9%E7%9A%84%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%9B%0A%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%20byTotalAmount%20-%E6%80%BB%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%AD%A4%E5%A4%84%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","maxLength":"17,2"}}],"open":false}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0A%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": [
        {
            "budgetSubTypeName": "分类",
            "budgetSubTypeId": "BGTSUBTYPE",
            "children": [
                {
                    "subSeqId": 1,
                    "subName": "科目名称",
                    "expenseTypes": [
                        {
                            "expSeqId": 2,
                            "subjectSeqId": 1,
                            "expId": "01",
                            "expName": "机票费"
                        }
                    ],
                    "orderNum": 0,
                    "subTypeSeqId": 3,
                    "amountEntryMode": "standPerDay",
                    "standardValue": 10.15
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为查询成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/subject/type/list

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/subject/type/list

接口描述

本接口适用于全量查询公司下的预算科目分类+科目列表，呈现树状结构，首层为预算科目分类，子级为预算科目分类下的预算科目列表。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":null}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%2B%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"TYPE001","desc":"%20%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"children","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"10","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"expenseTypes","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"expSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subjectSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"2","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8BID","exampleValue":"01","desc":"","maxLength":"25"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expName","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E6%9C%BA%E7%A5%A8%E8%B4%B9","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"orderNum","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E9%A1%BA%E5%BA%8F","exampleValue":"0","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"subTypeSeqId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"20","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"amountEntryMode","required":false,"label":"%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F","exampleValue":"standPerDay","desc":"%20byTotalAmount%20-%E6%80%BB%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%0AstandPerDay-%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86*%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"standardValue","required":false,"label":"%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"30.2","desc":"%20%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%20standPerDay-%E6%A0%87%E5%87%86*%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9%E6%97%B6%0A%E8%BE%93%E5%85%A5%E6%AF%8F%E4%BA%BA%E5%A4%A9%E7%9A%84%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%80%BC%EF%BC%9B%0A%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E5%BD%95%E5%85%A5%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%BA%20byTotalAmount%20-%E6%80%BB%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%AD%A4%E5%A4%84%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E5%80%BC","maxLength":"17,2"}}],"open":false}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0A%0A","maxLength":"5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]}

{}

响应报文

{
    "data": [

            "budgetSubTypeName": "分类",

            "children": [

sucess为查询成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
